industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Delorean Corporation Limited
summary: Delorean Corporation Limited engages in the renewable energy generation and retail business in Australia and New Zealand. It is involved in designing, building, commissioning, and operation of anaerobic digestion infrastructure plants. The company also develops, owns, and manages bioenergy plants. In addition, it fabricates and manufactures tanks, pipework, and structural steel, as well as specializes IP in stainless steel double-bunded tanks for liquid storage and mixing. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is headquartered in West Perth, Australia.
